query_result.reasoning:
The question asks about how US Steel has addressed its planned merger with Nippon Steel and the effect on its business operations. This is a current events question about a major business deal. Let me search for information about this.

Let me search for recent information about the US Steel - Nippon Steel merger plans.

tool_calls.name: web_search
tool_calls.args: {"search_query": "US Steel Nippon Steel merger planned acquisition effect business operations", "number_of_results": 10}

tool_output.output:
[{"url": "https://khabarasia.com/business/20250106-nippon-steel-and-u-s-steel-sue-biden-administration-over-blocked-merger", "title": "Nippon Steel and U.S. Steel Sue Biden Administration Over Blocked Merger - Khabar Asia", "content": "The proposed acquisition, which would see Nippon Steel integrate U.S. Steel into its operations, has faced opposition from the U.S. government. The companies argue that the block not only affects their business interests but also disrupts the global steel industry’s dynamics.", "score": 0.8719229, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Proposed_acquisition_of_U.S._Steel_by_Nippon_Steel", "title": "Acquisition of U.S. Steel by Nippon Steel - Wikipedia", "content": "A 13-page report by the pro-business Committee to Unleash Prosperity: "The deal offer from Nippon Steel provides an unprecedented premium to U.S. Steel shareholders, bolstering the company’s financial health and potential for growth. Moreover, the infusion of capital and technological advancements promised by Nippon Steel can rejuvenate U.S. Steel’s operations, enhancing productivity and competitiveness".

## References

`{{cite web}}`", "score": 0.77261686, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://nwindianabusiness.com/community/business-news/u-s-steel-stockholders-approve-merger-with-nippon-steel/64321", "title": "U.S. Steel stockholders approve merger with Nippon Steel • Northwest Indiana Business Magazine", "content": "U.S. Steel would maintain its name and headquarters in Pennyslvania. Nippon has pledged no job cuts will occur as a result of the deal.

The U.S. Department of Justice is seeking more details as part of an antitrust review of Nippon Steel's proposed acquisition of U.S. Steel.", "score": 0.6964752, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://journal-neo.su/2024/10/10/on-the-political-issues-and-problems-related-to-the-planned-merger-between-nippon-steel-and-us-steel", "title": "Merger of Nippon Steel and US Steel: an important event for the industry", "content": "Last August, the management of US Steel Corporation (USS), one of America’s oldest companies, said it was looking for a “strategic investor” to resolve years of accumulated problems. Of all the contenders, by December 2023, Japan’s Nippon Steel (NS) Corporation had emerged as the favorite, with its promise to invest $14.6 billion in US Steel, within the USA, in the event of a merger between the two companies. Under these circumstances, the deal would in effect be purchase of the latter by NS.", "score": 0.68420124, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://srnnews.com/yellen-says-cfius-made-thorough-analysis-of-blocked-us-steel-nippon-steel-merger", "title": "Yellen says CFIUS made thorough analysis of blocked US Steel-Nippon Steel merger - SRN News", "content": "By David Lawder

WASHINGTON (Reuters) -U.S. Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen said on Wednesday that Nippon Steel’s planned acquisition of U.S. Steel received a “thorough analysis” by an interagency review body that was sent to President Joe Biden, who blocked the deal on national security grounds.", "score": 0.67885995, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://www.france24.com/en/tv-shows/business/20250106-nippon-steel-and-us-steel-sue-biden-administration-usw-and-cleveland-cliffs-over-blocked-merger-deal", "title": "Nippon Steel, US Steel sue Biden administration over blocked merger deal - Business - France 24", "content": "US Steel and Nippon Steel have filed lawsuits in Washington in a bid to overturn last week's decision by the Biden administration to block their planned merger. In a scathing statement, the steelmakers accused the outgoing president of making the move for political gain. They also sued the USW union and rival bidder Cleveland-Cliffs, accusing them of colluding to kill the deal to try to monopolise the US steel industry. Also in this edition: a 276 kg bluefin tuna fetches €1.2 million at a New", "score": 0.6496014, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://gmk.center/en/news/biden-plans-to-block-the-merger-of-nippon-steel-and-us-steel-bloomberg", "title": "Biden plans to block the merger of Nippon Steel and US Steel - Bloomberg", "content": "In early December, Nippon Steel reaffirmed its confidence that the acquisition of US Steel could be completed by the end of 2024 if the deal goes through the proper procedures and is approved by the Biden administration.

As GMK Center reported earlier, Japanese Prime Minister Shigeru Ishiba, according to Reuters, sent a letter to the US President asking him to approve the deal so as not to harm recent efforts to strengthen ties between the two countries.

Tags:", "score": 0.6429039, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://www.wtae.com/article/biden-us-steel-nippon-sale/60200340", "title": "US Steel sale to Nippon Steel opposed by President Biden", "content": "Nippon Steel announced in December that it planned to buy the Pittsburgh-based steel producer for $14.1 billion in cash, raising concerns about what the transaction could mean for unionized workers, supply chains and U.S. national security.

The Japanese company reiterated Friday how the deal benefits U. S. Steel, union workers, the American steel industry and national security.", "score": 0.60498303, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://thehill.com/opinion/white-house/5061395-us-steel-nippon-steel-merger", "title": "Why Trump should switch sides on the US Steel-Nippon Steel merger (but probably won’t)", "content": "The US Steel-Nippon combination would push the company to third among world steel producers, behind fast-shrinking Arcelor Mittal. With a small manufacturing footprint in the United States, the likelihood of consolidation in the U.S. is much lower than with Cliffs, which operates over 20 steel-producing sites. And, under Cliffs, all the white-collar staff is almost certainly gone.", "score": 0.5860734, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://khabarasia.com/tag/nippon-steel", "title": "Nippon Steel - Khabar Asia", "content": "Nippon Steel and U.S. Steel have filed lawsuits against the Biden administration, accusing it of illegal interference in their proposed merger after the U.S. blocked the acquisition for political reasons.

Blocking_Nippon___Is_Japan_a_Friend_or_Foe_

## Blocking Nippon – Is Japan a Friend or Foe?

U.S. President Joe Biden’s move to block Japan’s Nippon Steel from acquiring U.S. Steel raises questions about the complexities of global alliances and the safeguarding of strategic industries.", "score": 0.5232017, "raw_content": null}]
